title: The data black hole at the center of AI
summary: Dwarkesh Patel argues that massive data volume is the central, often invisible force holding together AI capabilities. He frames data scale as analogous to a gravitational "black hole" at the center of a galaxy of model capabilities, emphasizing the gulf between human and AI sample efficiency during training.
